title: Oxydectes hjalmarsonii
taxonomy: Oxydectes hjalmarsonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to Mexico and is a member of the Oxydectes genus. The Melastomataceae family is a large group of plants commonly known as the "membranous calyx" family due to their unique flower characteristics. This family is further divided into many genera, with Oxydectes being one of them. The classification of Oxydectes hjalmarsonii reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Melastomataceae family.
constituents: Oxydectes hjalmarsonii contains a variety of compounds, including iridoids and phenolic acids, which are likely responsible for its potential medicinal properties.
